rows.name: AceofCloud - Identity Provider Compromise Assessment
rows.description: Purple team exercise targeting AceofCloud SSO/OWA infrastructure based on Domain Intel scan results (Risk 89/100). Simulates APT29-style Identity Provider Compromise via sophisticated phishing targeting Okta SSO and Outlook Web Access portals.
rows.notes: Campaign targets: login.aceofcloud.com (Okta SSO), mail.aceofcloud.com (OWA). Based on scan ID 30122. Top matched actors: APT29, Scattered Spider, Fox Kitten.
